requirement_topic.en: Netherlands TenneT/DSO Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 荷兰TenneT/配电运营商并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 荷蘭TenneT/配電運營商併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in the Netherlands should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) connection review under the Netcode elektriciteit, with TenneT as transmission system operator and ACM as the energy-sector regulator. The practical evidence package normally includes NEN-EN 50549-1/-2 grid-code compliance, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for the Netherlands' 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. The Netherlands uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: the Netherlands is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Dutch DSOs often expect Dutch-language commissioning files.
summary.zh: 荷兰并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，依据Netcode elektriciteit接受配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）连接审查，TenneT为输电系统运营商，ACM为能源行业监管机构。实际证据包通常包括NEN-EN 50549-1/-2电网规程合规、IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对荷兰230 V单相/400 V三相、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。荷兰与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：荷兰为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。荷兰配电运营商通常期望荷兰语调试文件。
summary.zht: 荷蘭併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，依據Netcode elektriciteit接受配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）連接審查，TenneT為輸電系統運營商，ACM為能源行業監管機構。實際證據包通常包括NEN-EN 50549-1/-2電網規程合規、IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對荷蘭230 V單相/400 V三相、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。荷蘭與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：荷蘭為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。荷蘭配電運營商通常期望荷蘭語調試文件。

standards_or_laws: NEN-EN 50549-1 / NEN-EN 50549-2 — requirements for generating plants connected in parallel with the public distribution network
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Netcode elektriciteit (Netherlands grid code, overseen by ACM); TenneT and DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) grid-connection and commissioning requirements
Netherlands low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not the Netherlands' 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to TenneT/DSO acceptance or ACM-overseen project review in the Netherlands.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非荷兰50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为荷兰TenneT/配电运营商认可或ACM监管项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非荷蘭50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為荷蘭TenneT/配電運營商認可或ACM監管項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Netherlands DSO/TenneT project acceptance. Exporters should prepare NEN-EN 50549-1/-2 grid-code evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Netherlands-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Netherlands voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For sites under DSO load constraints, include earthing, surge protection, and grid ride-through assumptions in the project file, and provide Dutch-language documentation where the DSO requires it.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代荷兰配电运营商/TenneT项目验收。出口商应准备NEN-EN 50549-1/-2电网规程证据、IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、荷兰专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称荷兰电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。对于受配电运营商负荷约束的现场，项目文件应包括接地、浪涌保护和电网穿越假设，并在配电运营商要求时提供荷兰语文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代荷蘭配電運營商/TenneT項目驗收。出口商應準備NEN-EN 50549-1/-2電網規程證據、IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、荷蘭專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱荷蘭電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。對於受配電運營商負荷約束的現場，項目文件應包括接地、浪湧保護和電網穿越假設，並在配電運營商要求時提供荷蘭語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) connection review under the Netcode elektriciteit and any applicable TenneT requirement; NEN-EN 50549-1/-2 grid-code compliance is required
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a Netherlands DSO/TenneT approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Netherlands DSO/TenneT grid-connection review. Prepare NEN-EN 50549-1/-2, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for the Netherlands' 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and provide Dutch-language commissioning documentation where required. Verify current DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis), TenneT, and ACM project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足荷兰配电运营商/TenneT并网审查。请准备NEN-EN 50549-1/-2、IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为荷兰230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并在需要时提供荷兰语调试文件。出货或调试前请直接核实现行配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）、TenneT和ACM项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足荷蘭配電運營商/TenneT併網審查。請準備NEN-EN 50549-1/-2、IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為荷蘭230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並在需要時提供荷蘭語調試文件。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）、TenneT和ACM項目要求。
